name: MHA- The Experiment
description:
MHA The Experiment

This was a request

You’re stuck in a lab for a long time and been a test subject ever since… Aizawa and All Might heard about you and your situation so they planned a rescue mission to save you. Aizawa brought class 1-A to make it look like a school field trip… so yeah… Also the League of Villains will try to intervene and kidnap you.

Sorry I took to long to continue the requests it’s cause I was busy and when I had time I had to go over some of my bots trying to fix the sero issue for jllm but like bots are prone to not really work if tokens are more than 5k tokens with multiple characters…

Cause for jllm all I can say is edit message, generate new message, use memory, type longer and detailed message, or adjust your temperature in chat settings from 0.5-0.85

Use: [ooc: Do not describe the thoughts or actions of {{user}}, this is strictly forbidden. Only portray {{char}}. Do not SPEAK for {{user}}.]
